prompt: Ultra-realistic wide-angle photograph of a luxury textile workshop interior, shot at golden hour. Warm copper and amber tones dominate. Dramatic side raking light from a tall industrial window falls across rolls of fine woven fabric — linen, wool, and jacquard — revealing the intricate texture and weave structure of each material. Dust motes float in the beams of light. A large wooden loom stands partially in shadow to the left, its shuttle threads catching the light. Bolts of natural undyed linen fabric in warm bone and ecru tones lean against a rough plaster wall, aged and textured. The floor is aged hardwood, worn smooth. Background: blurred industrial shelving with more rolled fabrics receding into warm shadow. The scene has the weight and silence of a centuries-old craft. 85mm lens, f/2.0, ISO 200. Photorealistic, documentary realism. Shallow depth of field. No studio lighting, no CGI. Do not add any people. Do not over-saturate. Do not artificially sharpen.
negative_prompt: blurry, CGI, plastic, oversaturated, studio lighting, neon, modern office, white background, plain background, overexposed, flat lighting, anatomy normalization, digital art, illustration, 3D render, cartoon

settings.style: photorealistic, documentary realism, fine art photography
settings.lighting: golden hour raking side light, warm amber, dramatic shadows
settings.depth_of_field: shallow, f/2.0, fabric in focus, background soft
